prompt: The little red seaplane flies forward and banks gently, its propeller spinning fast, continuing to trail a soft puffy smoke-trail while the big fluffy 'BUD ISLAND' cloud-skywriting drifts and billows gently in the breeze. The camera does a slow, smooth cinematic push-in with a gentle downward tilt, gliding over the sparkling turquoise lagoon toward the colorful tropical villa and pool, palm fronds swaying in the wind, a few seabirds gliding across the sky, warm golden sunlight glinting and sparkling on the water. Bright, joyful, premium PIXAR-style 3D animated establishing shot, smooth confident camera move. Uplifting tropical title-sequence music with a warm orchestral swell, a light airplane engine hum and a gentle ocean-breeze whoosh.
